hero.tagline: Learning and building at an accelerating pace

about.body:
Write a few sentences about yourself — your background, what you’ve built, and what problems genuinely interest you. Keep it direct and specific.

Maybe mention what you’re currently exploring or what draws you to the intersection of engineering and finance.

stats.label: Current Focus
stats.sub: what's on your bench right now

photography_desc: I’ve had a lot of fun messing around with my little Fujifilm XT30-II. All photos are unedited/SOOC (‘straight out of camera’) using various film sim recipes.
